news.t: US firms launch ETF to capitalize on Trump's deregulation push
Tidal Investments LLC Launches The Free Markets ETF (FMKT), First-of-Its-Kind Fund Targeting Companies Benefiting from Deregulation

holdings.infoBox: FMKT is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Interactive Brokers Group stock at 3.87%, Palo Alto Networks at 3.43%, Citizens Financial Group at 3.39%, KeyCorp at 3.30%, and The Williams Companies at 3.00%.

overview.description: The Free Markets ETF (FMKT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is a concentrated portfolio of US stocks believed best positioned to benefit from regulatory shifts. The fund managers actively analyze sectors, score, and select holdings based on favorable deregulation FMKT was launched on Jun 9, 2025 and is issued by Free Market.

data.title: US firms launch ETF to capitalize on Trump's deregulation push
data.text: A group of three investment management firms teamed up to launch an exchange-traded fund that will invest in companies they expect to benefit from deregulation and free capital markets, the partners i...

data.title: Tidal Investments LLC Launches The Free Markets ETF (FMKT), First-of-Its-Kind Fund Targeting Companies Benefiting from Deregulation
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $FMKT #deregulation--First-of-its-kind Free Markets ETF debuts, providing investors an active strategy to access companies that may benefit from deregulation.
